# Quadratic equation solving

## Short Teaching Summary
Quadratic equation solving: Solve 5x^2 + 2x + 1 = 0 by finding coefficients and using the quadratic formula. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
